file_insights.purpose: Prompt template functions for the three-stage pipeline
file_insights.format_compliance: Suno V4.5 two-field format (style_prompt, lyrics_prompt; no [Intro] tag)

file_insights.purpose: Comprehensive implementation plan with 4 phases and 13 subtasks
file_insights.structure: Phased dependency-based architecture with status tracking
file_insights.current_progress: Phase 4 (Business Logic): subtask-4-1 completed, subtask-4-2 pending

patterns_discovered.name: Provider Abstraction Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Abstract LLMProvider base class with concrete implementations for Gemini and Chutes
patterns_discovered.benefit: Decouples business logic from provider-specific details

patterns_discovered.name: Three-Stage Orchestration Pipeline
patterns_discovered.description: Generate → Evaluate → Improve cycle with structured prompts at each stage
patterns_discovered.implementation: Separate prompt builder functions for each stage, input/output validated by Pydantic models

patterns_discovered.name: Preset-Driven Configuration
patterns_discovered.description: Reusable preset JSON files (brazilian_catholic variants) injected into prompts
patterns_discovered.use_case: Enables template-based generation with configurable style/language/mood

patterns_discovered.name: Structured Output via Schema
patterns_discovered.description: LLM responses parsed/validated against Pydantic models (SunoOutput, EvalResult)
patterns_discovered.providers: Gemini: response_json_schema; Chutes: json_schema with fallback to json_object

patterns_discovered.name: Async/Await Architecture
patterns_discovered.description: All LLM operations are async (google.genai.aio, AsyncOpenAI)
patterns_discovered.implication: Enables concurrent API calls and non-blocking I/O

gotchas_discovered.detail: [Intro] tag not supported in V4.5; must use two-field format (style_prompt, lyrics_prompt)
gotchas_discovered.impact: Prompts must be carefully structured to avoid tag-based formatting

gotchas_discovered.detail: Gemini uses response_json_schema; Chutes requires fallback chain (json_schema → json_object with schema in system prompt)
gotchas_discovered.risk: Different code paths needed per provider; requires testing with both

gotchas_discovered.detail: Edge Case 3 mentions retry logic for malformed responses; prompts.py must integrate with generator.py's retry mechanism
gotchas_discovered.dependency: Requires coordination between prompts.py, generator.py, and provider implementations

gotchas_discovered.detail: Preset JSON loaded by presets.py, validated against Pydantic Preset model, then injected into prompts
gotchas_discovered.complexity: Three-layer validation chain; errors at any layer could break generation

gotchas_discovered.detail: build_generation_prompt() accepts language parameter; must handle language-specific terminology and cultural nuances
gotchas_discovered.testing: Needs validation across multiple languages (at least Portuguese for Brazilian Catholic presets)

completion_criteria_met: Prompt template functions created for all three stages (generation, evaluation, improvement)
Suno V4.5 two-field format guidelines followed (no [Intro] tag, separate style_prompt/lyrics_prompt)
Prior feedback integration designed into generation and improvement prompts
Structured output instructions embedded for evaluation stage
commits: bdbe03e: auto-claude: subtask-4-1 - Create prompts.py with prompt template functions
approach_outcome.milestone: Phase 4 (Business Logic) unblocked; generator.py (subtask-4-2) can now proceed

recommendations.rationale: Directly depends on prompts.py; completes Generate stage of pipeline. Should include retry logic for malformed responses (Edge Case 3)
Document expected input/output format with concrete examples for each stage to prevent downstream integration issues

recommendations.action: Validate prompt templates with actual LLM providers
recommendations.rationale: Once generator.py and evaluator.py are complete, run integration tests with both Gemini and Chutes to validate JSON output compliance
build_generation_prompt() language parameter should have documented behavior for unsupported languages (default to English? error? template?)
As prompts evolve with model improvements, versioning (e.g., build_generation_prompt_v2) will help track performance across iterations
